list.name: portfolio
list.label: Portfolio
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT portfolio_name FROM trades WHERE portfolio_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.name: symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM trades ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts AS time,
  portfolio_name AS metric,
  SUM(pnl_perc) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_name ORDER BY ts) AS value
FROM trades
WHERE pnl_perc IS NOT NULL
  AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  NOW() AS time,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_perc > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS value
FROM trades
WHERE action = 'exit'
  AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT
  NOW() AS time,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(pnl_perc) AS numeric), 2) AS value
FROM trades
WHERE pnl_perc IS NOT NULL
  AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*) AS value
FROM trades
WHERE action IN ('exit','tsl')
  AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT
  NOW() AS time,
  ROUND(CAST(AVG(pnl_perc) AS numeric), 3) AS value
FROM trades
WHERE pnl_perc IS NOT NULL
  AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)

WITH cum AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    portfolio_name,
    SUM(pnl_perc) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_name ORDER BY ts) AS cum_pnl
  FROM trades
  WHERE pnl_perc IS NOT NULL
    AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
    AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
),
peak AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    portfolio_name,
    cum_pnl,
    MAX(cum_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY portfolio_name ORDER BY ts) AS running_peak
  FROM cum
)
SELECT
  ts AS time,
  portfolio_name AS metric,
  ROUND(CAST(cum_pnl - running_peak AS numeric), 2) AS value
FROM peak
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  ROUND(CAST(pnl_perc AS numeric), 2) AS "P&L %"
FROM trades
WHERE pnl_perc IS NOT NULL
  AND portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts,
  portfolio_name,
  symbol,
  action,
  ROUND(CAST(price AS numeric), 4)    AS price,
  ROUND(CAST(qty AS numeric), 6)      AS qty,
  ROUND(CAST(pnl_perc AS numeric), 3) AS pnl_perc,
  hold_bars
FROM trades
WHERE portfolio_name ~ '$portfolio'
  AND symbol ~ '$symbol'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT
  r.started_at                           AS started,
  s.name                                 AS strategy,
  r.status,
  r.summary->>'return_perc'              AS "return %",
  r.summary->>'sharpe_ratio'             AS sharpe,
  r.summary->>'max_drawdown'             AS "max DD",
  r.summary->>'num_trades'               AS trades,
  r.summary->>'win_perc'                 AS "win %",
  r.summary->>'buy_and_hold_perc'        AS "B&H %"
FROM backtest_runs r
LEFT JOIN strategies s ON r.strategy_id = s.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(r.started_at)
ORDER BY r.started_at DESC
LIMIT 100
